key_facts: The SRV is a wide viscosity range inline process viscometer.
It offers online, real-time, simultaneous viscosity and temperature monitoring.
The SRV provides repeatable measurements in both Newtonian and non-Newtonian fluids.
It is hermetically sealed and available with 316L stainless steel and Hastelloy C22 wetted parts.
The viscometer is available with EX certifications and Hygienic certified designs.
The SRV supports a wide range of process connections.
The device is calibrated to NIST traceable viscosity standards.
Hygienic variants are EHEDG and 3-A certified.
warnings_notes: Ingress Protection (IP69K) is limited by the M12 connector IP rating.
Protected by US and International patents granted and pending.

key_facts: The SRV is a wide viscosity range inline process viscometer.
Available electronics include the SME-TRD/SME-TR transmitter housing (IP66) for onsite/remote installation with or without display, and the SME-DRM DIN rail mount module with Ethernet connection.
The sensor cable can extend up to 1,500 meters.
M12 connectors are rated for IP67, IP68, and IP69K environments.
Standard wetted materials are 316L stainless steel, with options for custom coatings and Hastelloy C22.
A variety of process connection types are available, including flush, short/long insertion, threaded, flange, tri-clamp, Varinline, Ingold, API, and 6A.
Hygienic versions are EHEDG and 3-A certified.
SRV sensors are Ex certified, intrinsically safe, and cover a full Ex temperature range, meeting IECEx, ATEX, and JPEx standards.
The viscometer can be mounted in various configurations for pipes (flanged, tri-clamp, NPT thread, long insertion) and tanks (including long insertion adapters).
The document identifier is SRV-DS-2501.
warnings_notes: Tank mounting: Any configuration possible including long insertion adapters.

specifications.Digital Communication Protocols: Ethernet/IP, Modbus TCP, Profinet, Modbus RTU (RS-485), HART, Bluetooth LE 4.0

key_facts: The SRV is a wide viscosity range inline process viscometer.
The viscometer's electronics support display, USB, Ethernet, Modbus RTU, and HART connections.
It provides a 4-20mA analog output for viscosity (ch1), density (ch2), and temperature (ch3).
The device features an industrial high-contrast LCD with real-time process values, Bluetooth LE 4.0 connectivity, and status LEDs.
Dimensional specifications are provided for SME-TR, SME-TRD, and SME-DRM components, with units in millimeters and inches.
warnings_notes: All data subject to change without prior notice.
The sizes provided are approximate and may not be exact.

key_facts: The SRV is a wide viscosity range inline process viscometer.
Detailed dimensions are provided for the SRV, including a 3/4 inch NPT version with an overall length of 133 mm (5.24 inches).
Rheonics offers a mobile application for Android and iOS that connects to the SRV via Bluetooth and Cloud.
The mobile application provides real-time data, a process view, alerts, and sensor configuration.
PC software is available for data acquisition and analysis, connecting via USB, Ethernet, Bluetooth, and Cloud.
The PC software enables sensor configuration, calibration checks, and firmware upgrades.

specifications.communication_usb: USB 2.0 compliant service and data acquisition port

key_facts: The Rheonics SRV is a wide viscosity range inline process viscometer.
Customers can use an online RFQ form (https://rheonics.com/request-for-quotation/) to request a quotation for the SRV viscometer.
Accessories for the sensor are available via the product accessories page (https://rheonics.com/product-accessories/).
Custom calibrated viscosity ranges can be specified between 0.5 cP and 50,000 cP.
The Bluetooth LE 4.0 communication module is only available with the SME-TRD (E1) electronics option.
Various process connections are available, including threaded (3/4" NPT or G1/2"), custom flange, tri-clamp, flush variant, long insertion, slimline probe, reactor probe, and teletube.
Hygienic EHEDG or 3-A certified versions are available for custom flange, tri-clamp, flush variant, long insertion, and slimline probe process connections.
Rheonics holds granted and pending US and International patents.
The information provided in this document is subject to change without notice.
warnings_notes: Protected by US and International patents granted and pending.
